title: PermissionsConfig::default_allow Vec<String> globs loaded but never validated
description:
## Severity
Minor
## Dimension
security
## Location
src/config/permissions.rs:7-17
## Violation
default_allow accepts arbitrary glob strings from YAML with no validation. An unbounded glob like `**` permits ALL operations matching the tool's primary argument — effectively disabling the permission system while LOOKING enabled. Regex-style entries are treated as literal globs (silent mismatch). No per-tool scoping.
## Mandated refactor
Type as Vec<AllowEntry> { tool, pattern, mode } with Deserialize validating pattern via globset. Reject unbounded patterns unless allow_unbounded_globs=true. Warn if default_allow is non-empty but enabled=false.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
